What you get by joining

EARLY ACCESS BENEFITS

The first wave of members capture the highest-value onboarding slots. Here's what's waiting for you.

FIRST ACCESS

First access to the marketplace and ServiceCredits ledger when we launch.

PRIORITY TRAINING

Priority invites to training cohorts and certification pipelines.

LOCAL HUBS

Early access to local hubs, pooled services (health/education), and subscription supports.

GDP TRACKER

Transparent public GDP tracker so you can see how our community is performing.

FIRST EARNINGS

Early waitlist members get priority for initial paid gigs, subscriptions, and matching.

GOVERNANCE

Early members get influence over governance, pricing standards, and community protections.

Limited pilot capacity -- once cohorts fill, waits lengthen.
DON'T MISS OUT →
Your all-in-one platform

8+ MINI-APPS

Operating like WeChat's mini-app ecosystem. Access multiple essential services through a single secure account.

LightHouseHousing
TrustTransportTransportation
Workforce RecruiterJob Search
SupportMatchAccountability
DirectorySkill Sharing
SocketRelayMutual Aid
GentlePulseWellness
ChymeSocial Audio

$210B in services at full scale -- that's $42,000 per person, per year.

Scaling fast

CURRENT MOMENTUM

We're scaling training and provider onboarding fast. Here's where we stand.

YEAR-1 TARGETS

Provider onboarding72%

Platform infrastructure85%
Year-1 target: $50B captured (avg $10,000/person)

Launching now -- spots are limited. Early members shape the platform's direction.

Enrolling now

FIRST EARNING OPS

Waitlist members get priority for initial paid gigs, subscriptions, and marketplace matching.

SURVIVOR-LED GOVERNANCE

Simple process

HOW IT WORKS

Four simple steps from sign-up to self-sustaining income.

01

JOIN THE WAITLIST

Verify identity and skills later during onboarding. Just your email to start.

02

GET INVITED

Get invited to training cohorts and local hubs based on need and fit.

03

EARN SERVICECREDITS

Earn ServiceCredits for work, subscriptions, and pooled services.

04

BUILD INCOME

Convert skills to reputation to recurring income via marketplace matches and contracts.

WHY SIGN UP TODAY?

Early members capture the highest-value onboarding slots, first earning opportunities, and influence over governance and pricing. Limited pilot capacity -- once cohorts fill, waits lengthen.

Don't miss the chance to be among the founders shaping pay rates, certification standards, and community protections.

We will notify you as soon as the app is restored and openings are available. When they interfere, we keep going. Exit their economy -- build ours.

PSYOP-FREE ECONOMY

Built with care, respect, and dedication to serving the survivor community. Every feature is designed with trauma-informed principles.

PLATFORM STATUS

  • Active and continuously improving
  • Access: Open source code
  • Chat: Signal group

PRIVACY COMMITMENT

  • Complete account deletion
  • Data anonymization
  • We never sell data
  • Regular security audits
